case_title: PRINCE, KECIA L. VS GEE, MICHAEL OWNER CHINA EXPRESS KITCHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY PRINCE, KECIA L. AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, MICHAEL   OWNER CHINA EXPRESS KITCHEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-01-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL TO MICHAEL GEE, C/O CHINA EXPRESS KITCHEN, RETURNED SIGNED.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-01-1994, CONTINUED BY COURT TO JUN-15-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PRINCE, KECIA L. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEE, MICHAEL   OWNER CHINA EXPRESS KITCHEN $50.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GEE, MICHAEL   OWNER CHINA EXPRESS KITCHEN
